Name: MOD-Navigation-SideNav-Security: Verify 'Library' navigates to the Library page and is hidden for a user with Deactivate Resources permission
Precondition: System Admin credentials valid. Board Member 14 account ([MODERNIZED_BOARD_MEMBER_14_USEREMAIL]) has 'Deactivate Resources' permission pre-enabled — no permission change required before this test.
Objective: To verify clicking 'Library' in the new-style side navigation takes System Admin to /library showing global resources and workgroup folders and to verify the 'Library' link is absent from the side navigation for a user with the Deactivate Resources permission.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Login page is displayed.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email for System Admin in the 'Email' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=textbox name="Email" | value: [MODERNIZED_SYSTEM_ADMIN_USEREMAIL]
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Email value is populated.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=textbox name="Password" | value: [MODERNIZED_PASSWORD]
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Password is entered.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: System Admin is redirected to the Home page.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Navigate to the UI-Workroom workroom page
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: none | value: https://mod-lab-auto.boardeffect.diligentoneplatform-dev.com/workrooms/5732
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Workroom page is displayed at /workrooms/5732.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Side navigation" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Side navigation dialog opens.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Library' link in the side navigation
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link text="Library" within role=dialog | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is navigated to the Library page. URL is /library. Page title is 'Library'.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify Library page h1 heading 'Library' is displayed
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=heading level=1 name="Library" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Library' h1 heading is visible confirming the Library page has loaded.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify Library page subheading is displayed
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=heading level=2 name="Browse resources, workgroup and workroom collections, private and secured files" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Subheading 'Browse resources, workgroup and workroom collections, private and secured files' is visible.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'Resource library' folder row is visible in the Library table
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=row name="Resource library" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Resource library' row is listed in the Library table.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'UI-Workgroup' workgroup row is visible with a 'Workgroup' label
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=row name="UI-Workgroup Workgroup" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'UI-Workgroup' row is visible with a 'Workgroup' type label confirming workgroup folders are listed on the Library page.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Open profile menu" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Profile menu opens.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Sign Out" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: System Admin is logged out. Login page is displayed.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Login page is displayed.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email for Board Member 14 in the 'Email' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=textbox name="Email" | value: [MODERNIZED_BOARD_MEMBER_14_USEREMAIL]
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Email value is populated.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=textbox name="Password" | value: [MODERNIZED_PASSWORD]
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Password is entered.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Board Member 14 is redirected to the Home page.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Navigate to the new-style Home page
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: none | value: https://mod-lab-auto.boardeffect.diligentoneplatform-dev.com/home-new
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: New-style Home page is displayed at /home-new.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Side navigation" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Side navigation dialog opens.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'Library' link is NOT present in the side navigation for Board Member 14
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link text="Library" within role=dialog | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Library' link is not visible in the side navigation confirming the Deactivate Resources permission hides the Library menu item for this user.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Open profile menu" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Profile menu opens.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Sign Out" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Board Member 14 is logged out. Login page is displayed.
